name: 6-ethyl-5-[(2S)-1-(3-methoxypropyl)-2-phenyl-1,2,3,4-tetrahydroquinolin-7-yl]pyrimidine-2,4-diamine
description: 6-ethyl-5-[(2s)-1-(3-methoxypropyl)-2-phenyl-1,2,3,4-tetrahydroquinolin-7-yl]pyrimidine-2,4-diamine is a solid. This compound belongs to the phenylquinolines. These are heterocyclic compounds containing a quinoline moiety substituted with a phenyl group. This substance targets the protein renin.
